content:
Yooo!!
I’m Starriex (Star works too). I’ve spent a good chunk of time translating Kuro Games (mostly Punishing: Gray Raven) from CN/EN -> RU, and I’ve been following Morimens basically since release. Really glad to be here and excited to be part of the team! Hope we get along well!! <:celeste_pray:1408324281624170566>

Hello! You can call me Allie. I suppose if we go with the definition of “first language” as “…primary language that an individual learns from birth and typically uses most naturally in their daily life” (Jacob, 2023), then that would be English and Malay for me. 

I’ve never done any translation work in the past, but I’ve been a teacher for quite some time and primarily teach (and teach in) English. Currently not teaching, but I’m doing research in academia now so the proofreading and reading and everything that comes with that (and dying on a daily basis, that’s part of the journey haha). 

I’m hoping to help with proofreading and in anything else related to this area. I absolutely love Morimens, and very glad to be a part of this with all of you! ❤️

Hello! I'm Lislium but feel free to call me Lili. My native language is French and I volunteered as a translator and proofreader. I studied gameplay programming but I'm currently trying to change my career path towards game translation/localization so being here is a win-win situation for me, as I get to help a game I love reach more people while honing my translation skills! <:wanda_smug:1408324303912439878> This is the first time I'm working on a project this big and intricate so I'll probably have a lot of questions. Thank you in advance hehe! <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541> It's really nice to meet yall and I'm thrilled to be here! <:celeste_pray:1408324281624170566>

Hello! 
I'm Cha and I'm translating to ID, I'm proficient in EN and I can read and speak a little CN!
I'm unemployed rn so I have time! Morimens have everything I love and I'm excited to be involved
looking forward to working with everyone!
